wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation|2}}{{Character Infobox|Silent2}} The {{StS2|Silent}} is the second of the five characters in [[Slay the Spire 2 Wiki|Slay the Spire 2]]. She is unlocked after completing a run with the {{KW|Ironclad||2}}. She starts with 70 Max HP. At {{Asc|2|Ascension|2}} and above she starts with 56 HP. She starts each run with an additional {{C|Strike (Silent)|Strike|2}} and {{C|Defend (Silent)|Defend|2}} in her deck, to make up for the 2 additional cards she draws at the start of each combat. == Starting Loadout == === Starting Relic === {{R|Ring of the Snake||2}} - At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards. Can be replaced by {{R|Ring of the Drake||2}}. === Starting Deck === These {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Silent&rarity:Basic|Cards|2}} cannot be obtained through regular card rewards. * {{C|Strike (Silent)|Strike|2}} x5 * {{C|Defend (Silent)|Defend|2}} x5 * {{C|Neutralize||2}} x1 * {{C|Survivor||2}} x1 === Silent Cards === There are a total of 82 regular cards in Silents's card pool. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Silent_Skill_Common.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Silent&rarity:Common|Common Cards|2}} x20 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Silent_Skill_Uncommon.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Silent&rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon Cards|2}} x36 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Silent_Skill_Rare.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Silent&rarity:Rare|Rare Cards|2}} x26 When playing {{2|Multiplayer}}, these cards get added to the card pool: * {{C|Flanking||2}} * {{C|Sneaky||2}} There are also five cards that are not obtainable through normal means. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Silent_Skill_Ancient.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Silent&rarity:Ancient|Ancient Cards|2}} x2 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Silent_Skill_Event.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Silent&rarity:Event|Event Cards|2}} x3
A full list of Silent Cards (and more) can be found {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Silent|here|2}}. == Unique Relics == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Relic |- |'''Common''' |{{R|Snecko Skull||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{R|Tingsha||2}}, {{R|Twisted Funnel||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{R|Helical Dart||2}}, {{R|Paper Krane||2}}, {{R|Tough Bandages||2}} |- |'''Shop''' |{{R|Ninja Scroll||2}} |} == Unique Potions == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Potion |- |'''Common''' |{{P|Poison Potion||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{P|Cunning Potion||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{P|Ghost in a Jar||2}} |} == Unlocks == The Silent is unlocked by completing a run with the {{KW|Ironclad||2}}. This does not have to be a win. Like all characters, there are 6 Epochs in the [[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline|Timeline]] which are discovered upon reaching certain Silent gameplay milestones, unlocking Cards, Relics, and Potions unique to the Silent. {| class="wikitable" |+ ![[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline#The Silent|Epoch]]
(Unlock Requirement) !Rewards |- |{{2|Timeline#Bigger Prey|Bigger Prey}}
(Beating Act 1) |{{C|Snakebite||2}}, {{C|Bubble Bubble||2}}, {{C|Accelerant||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Ill|Ill}}
(Beating Act 2) |{{R|Tingsha||2}}, {{R|Tough Bandages||2}}, {{R|Paper Krane||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Trophies|Trophies}}
(Beating Act 3) |{{P|Poison Potion||2}}, {{P|Cunning Potion||2}}, {{P|Ghost in a Jar||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Soup|Soup}}
(Beating {{Asc|1|Ascension|2}}) |{{C|Hidden Daggers||2}}, {{C|Phantom Blades||2}}, {{C|Blade of Ink||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Poisoner|Poisoner}}
(Killing 15 [[Slay the Spire 2:Elites|Elites]]) |{{C|Reflex||2}}, {{C|Hand Trick||2}}, {{C|Master Planner||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Nemesis|Nemesis}}
(Killing 15 [[Slay the Spire 2:Bosses|Bosses]]) |{{R|Snecko Skull||2}}, {{R|Twisted Funnel||2}}, {{R|Helical Dart||2}} |} Additionally, completing a single run with the Silent, even if the run ends with a loss, will unlock the {{KW|Regent||2}} as a playable character.
